methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc:
Initialise the safe. The creator becomes the bootstrap admin and must call
`bootstrap` once (after funding the app account) to create the first admin
signer group. The application is intentionally non-updatable and
non-deletable for custody safety.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc:
Genesis bootstrap: create the first admin signer group as a 1-of-1 group
whose sole member is the creator, with full admin privileges and all
actions allowed. Callable exactly once, only by the creator. After this,
every privileged change must go through governance.

Requires the app account to be funded for box MBR beforehand.

methods.name: proposeAssetTransfer
methods.desc: Create an asset-transfer (ASA) proposal. Also used for opt-in (amount 0, receiver = safe).

methods.name: proposeAppCall
methods.desc: Create a NoOp application-call proposal with up to 4 application args.

methods.name: proposeKeyRegistration
methods.desc: Create a key-registration proposal (online or offline).

methods.name: proposeAdminChange
methods.desc: Create a governed signer-group administration proposal.

methods.name: approveProposal
methods.desc: Record the caller's approval of a proposal.

methods.name: executeProposal
methods.desc: Execute a proposal once its threshold has been met.

methods.name: cancelProposal
methods.desc: Cancel a pending proposal. Allowed for the proposer or any member of the proposal's group.
